description: A premium horizontally scrolling carousel of 'Gold-Tier' businesses. Each card features the business logo, a 5-star rating display, and a 'Top Verified' badge. The background of this section is a very faint Gold gradient (#FFFDF0 to #FFFFFF) to signify its 'sponsored' status without being intrusive. Includes 'Visit Website' and 'View Details' buttons on each card.
